feedback.text: On top of everything that is included in this initiative, I'd like to see changes regarding the ability of video game developers/publishers to simply "turn off" their games for their players who paid for them in the past, effectively making it so they are no longer able to use the product that they have purchased. I believe it is unfair that at any point in time, a certain group of people can suddenly decide that I should no longer have access to content that I legally bought and have every right to use. Please consider making changes to this initiative so that video game developers/publishers are not allowed to simply kill their games, effectively blocking their players from using the products they paid for.
